products.title: EOS Compact DP anthracite
products.description: You can control the temperature of your sauna heater and light in the cabin very easily and quickly using the multifunctional buttons. The 3.5 “TFT colour display clearly shows all important parameters at a glance. The control offers a wide range of functions with numerous comfort functions, for example a practical time preset in combination with a safety device, the setup of four different user profiles, a display for remaining time, a 24 h pre-set timer, an operation lock, a safety temperature limit (139°C), an output for cabin light and fan, as well as heating time limitation (6 h / 12 h / 18 h / unlimited) and a holiday home mode. The control unit impresses with its modern and elegant design and with its flat housing. Flexible mounting options - wall mounting and partially recessed mounting. Available in arctic white and anthracite. Available for Finnish sauna and sauna with humidity operation, each with 10 kW and various function levels. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O).
products.short_description: You can control the temperature of your sauna heater and light in the cabin very easily and quickly using the multifunctional buttons. The 3.5 “TFT colour display clearly shows all important parameters at a glance.

products.title: EOS Econ D1
products.description: Control unit for dry and humid sauna operation (H-variant for sauna heaters with vaporizer) with LCD display with multi-language menu navigation. Affordable value model with all essential control functions. Modern, slim housing for surface or semi-recessed mounting. Cable connections at the rear side. Illuminated, high contrast LCD display with menu navigation in 12 languages, clock, output for cabin light 230 V, heating time limitation up to 6 h, Life-Guard function, remaining heating time display. With keypad lock (child lock). Safety temperature limitation 139 °C. Inc. temperature sensor with 2 m cable. The H-variant additionally with humidity control and output for vaporizer. Humidity control on time basis, adjustable in 10 steps. With low water recognition, after-heating and sauna dry function after the humid operation. Control range: 30 °C - 70 °C (dry mode) and 30 °C - 115 °C (humid mode). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for private use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 9 kW. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Humidity mode: 6 kW + 3 kW for vaporizer equipment (H1)
products.short_description: Control unit for dry and humid sauna operation (H-variant for sauna heaters with vaporizer) with LCD display with multi-language menu navigation. Affordable value model with all essential control functions.

products.title: EOS Econ I1
products.description: EOS Econ is a versatile series of modern sauna control units featuring a large scope of functions and a contemporary, slim-shape design. Thanks to the modern electronic relays EOS Econ control units have very low noise operation. They are compliant with the latest safety norms in Europe and have been independently tested and approved for quality and safety. Illuminated alphanumeric LCD-Display (time, functions, error messages), temperature control range 30 °C - 70 °C. Menu navigation in 12 languages. Heating time limitation 12 h (1 minute step), keypad lock, switch for cabin light. Suitable for nearly all models of infrared heaters and foils. This model stands out thanks to the very large 9 kW switching capacity and is a great choice for large infrared cabins. Slim housing for wall-mounting or semi-recessed installation. Temperature sensor with 2 m cable is included.

products.title: EOS EmoTec D anthracite/black
products.description: Advanced control unit for private and commercial operation with a remote control panel and a separate relay box. Includes digital sensor with 5 m cable. Innovative operation concept with jog-dial switch, quick access to all functions. The display panel may be installed remotely at up to 100 m distance. Modern TFT colour display with menu navigation in 19 languages. H-version additionally with humidity control. For all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters . Humidity control - either in proportional to time way (allows constant steam production per given time) or with an optional humidity sensor as per relative air humidity (allows exact humidity setting per rel. air humidity in %). Output for vaporizer up to 3 kW. With water shortage detection. Quick selection between dry sauna or humid sauna operation modes with a jog-dial. With the additional convenient features: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. 10,0 kW resistive load (extension possible: PEB 10 / PEB 18 / PEB 36), 3,0 kW for vaporizer in humid sauna mode Proportional to time (0 - 100%) or with humidity sensor (rel. %) 230 V / min 5 W, max 100 W, dimmable. Resistive loads Digital, inc. 5 m cable. 2nd sensor optional. Hum. sens. optional

products.title: EOS InfraTec Classic 3.5 kW
products.description: Illuminated alphanumeric LCD-Display (time, functions, error messages). Temperature control range 30 °C - 70 °C. Variable heating time 1 - 99 min. Switch for cabin light. Integrated main on/off switch. Flush-mounting installation. Delivery includes temperature sensor with 3 m cable. Available with the pre-mounted cable set: pre-mounted power supply mains cable with plug, 3-core cable for cabin light and connection cable for IR heaters. Alternatively also available without cable set (only controller and sensor). The max. switching capacity 3.5 kW may be extended with an optional power extension modules.

products.title: EOS Compact D18 anthracite
products.description: The sauna control unit, with a power output of 18 kW (extendable with a power extension unit), combines a wide range of features with a simple and intuitive operating concept. Easily and quickly control not only the temperature of your sauna heater but also the cabin lighting via four direct selection buttons and six softkeys. The 3.5" TFT display clearly shows all key parameters at a glance. This control unit offers an extensive feature set with numerous comfort functions, including a convenient pre-set timer with safety lock, four customizable user profiles, connections for lighting and ventilation, a control lock, a safety temperature limiter (139 °C), remaining time display, 24-hour pre-set timer, heating time limitation (6 hrs / 12 hrs / 18 hrs / unlimited), and a holiday home mode. For added personalization, this control series is available in arctic white or modern anthracite, as a version for traditional Finnish (dry) sauna operation, or as a combi-control unit for both dry and humid operation. Each version supports 18 kW and offers different feature levels. The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for demanding private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 18 kW. products.title: EOS Econ D4
products.description: Electronic sauna control unit for dry and humid sauna operation (H-variant for sauna heaters with vaporizer) with a large LCD display with multi-language menu navigation and new innovative functions. Particularly suitable for advanced commercial sauna cabins. Extra-large, multi-line LCD display, all parameters at a glance. With 24 h pre-set timer in real time. Menu navigation in 12 languages, clock, output for cabin light 230V, Life-Guard function, remaining heating time display. With keypad lock (child lock). Safety temperature limitation 139 °C. Unlimited heating time (for commercial use). Switching power 9 kW, may be extended for connection of more powerful heaters. Inc. temperature sensor with 2 m cable. Humidity sensor optional. The H-variant additionally with humidity control and output for vaporizer. Humidity control on time basis, adjustable in 10 steps. With low water recognition, after-heating and sauna dry function after the humid operation. Control range: 30 °C - 70 °C (dry mode) and 30 °C - 115 °C (humid mode). Control unit for Finnish (dry) sauna. Ideal for private and commercial use. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 9 kW (power extension possible). Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Humidity mode (H4): 6 kW + 3 kW for vaporizer equipment. Can be expanded via the connection of power switching devices

products.title: EOS EmoStyle Hi maple black
products.description: Luxury class digital control system for private and commercial operation. For dry and humid sauna operation with humidity control (for all EOS Bi-O type sauna heaters ). Features a special design display panel with glass front, colour TFT display and a stylish wooden inlay cut of maple or walnut with capacitive buttons. With the remote display panel and separated relay box. Innovative operating concept allows quick and intuitive operation. For installations inside sauna cabins. All functions as the EOS EmoStyle D / H control unit. Choice of 4 designs of the display panel: The Cloud version features WiFi and cloud connectivity, and is compatible with the EOS Spa Control App and the door contact safety system for monitoring door status. Thanks to the EOS Cloud connection, the control unit is always up to date via over-the-air software updates. Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Control unit for saunas with dry and humid operation. Compatible with all Bi-O sauna heaters up to 10 kW. Switching capacity can be extended with power extension units. Temperature control range: 30 °C – 115 °C (Finnish) and 30 °C – 70 °C (Bi-O). Always up to date thanks to WiFi connectivity and EOS Cloud integration. WiFi and cloud capable– always up to date with the latest software. Integrated WiFi dongle allows easy pairing. Connection option for the door contact safety system to monitor door status. Extended control with the EOS Spa Control App. 10,0 kW (can be expanded with LSG: LSG 10 / LSG 18 / LSG 36)

products.title: LSG Hammam
products.description: Allows to control a hammam as an additional cabin from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel. Up to 8 separate cabins ( sauna , steam room, hammam) may be connected to one EmoTouch 3 display panel. Includes 3 digital temperature sensor with 5 m cable for floor, bench and wall temperature control. Temperature control range. Three separate 3 kW outputs for floor, bench and wall heating. Includes 10 m sauna bus connection cable.
products.short_description: Allows to control a hammam as an additional cabin from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel.

products.title: LSG Infrared
products.description: LSG Infrared allows to control a separate infrared cabin with the existing EmoTouch 3 display panel. 3 outputs (2 x dimmable, 1 x switchable) - can be controlled individually or bundled in groups. Temperature control as per air temperature or by feeling through zone dimming. Delivery includes : 10 m sauna bus connection cable, digital temperature sensor with 5 m cable, 230 V power adaptor (requires 2 power supplies).
products.short_description: LSG Infrared allows to control a separate infrared cabin with the existing EmoTouch 3 display panel.

products.title: LSG Sauna
products.description: Allows to connect an additional sauna cabin and control it from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel. Up to 8 separate saunas (and/or steam rooms) may be connected to one display panel. Includes digital temperature sensor with 5 m cable. Includes 10 m sauna bus connection cable. Supports dry and humid sauna operation. 9 kW switching capacity.
products.short_description: Allows to connect an additional sauna cabin and control it from the existing EOS EmoTouch 3 display panel.

products.title: LSG Steam
products.description: LSG Steam allows operating the steam generators of many other brands. Compatibility must be checked in advance. Suitable for EOS SteamRock II Basic and EOS SteamAttrac models. Includes: 10 m sauna bus connection cable and a digital temperature sensor with 5 m cable. Attention: Not suitable for EOS SteamRock II Premium ​​​​​​​.
products.short_description: LSG Steam allows operating the steam generators of many other brands. Compatibility must be checked in advance.

products.title: PEB 10 CA
products.description: Provides the additional 10 kW switching capacity. New, improved construction with wall-mounting "EOS Compact"-housing, connections at the bottom or back side. Low-noise operation. In combination with a 9 kW (10 kW) sauna control unit suitable for twin-circuit sauna heaters up to 19 kW (20 kW) power (with 18 kW capable sauna control units – up to 28 kW , except “HD” type sauna heaters).
products.short_description: Provides the additional 10 kW switching capacity.

products.title: SBM-App module
products.description: With the extended EOS Spa Control App, various other cabin types in addition to a sauna cabin, such as steam rooms, hammams and infrared cabins can be conveniently controlled in connection with one SBM-App module each while on the move, regardless of whether you‘re sitting in your car on the way home from grocery shopping, returning from a trip and just landing at the airport, or heading home after a hard day of work. A quick check of the current sauna condition like its temperature or remaining heating time is easily possible. Management of several cabins is also possible. Further features are the different preset profiles for the sauna, which can be customized with just a few clicks. For even more control, the temperature of the bench sensor can be accessed and the status of the drying program for sauna, steam room or hammam can be queried. Moreover, the potential-free contact can be controlled via app and can e. g. regulate an additional light source. Notice: In order to also control steam rooms, IR cabins and hammams with the app, you need to update the firmware of your control unit. Further information can be found in the manual or here . The EOS Spa Control App will automatically detect the paired sauna control unit and adjust its interface for a simple and intuitive operation. Currently supported mobile devices: Android and Apple iOS. Compact size module with pre-mounted cable for connection to the sauna control unit . RJ45 connector for internet connection. With status LEDs for network activity. No separate power supply needed. Delivery does not include a smartphone or a tablet-PC. Requires the installation of the EOS Spa Control App . Internet connection required at initial setup. If you switch on the heater using pre-set timers or a remote control, an additional safety system is required. This safety measure could be a cover protection rail on the heater, a door supervision device or another type of technical equipment (e.g. cover guard, EOSafe ). 1 x 10/100 Base-T Ethernet RJ45 jack, shielded

products.description: The module for EOS Compact, EmoTec, EmoStyle, U-Command and EmoTouch 3 sauna control systems provides commercial sauna operators with a highly practical function. SBM-Hot module provides a power boost, which will run the sauna heater at full power up in 20 minutes, regardless of the current temperature (however only up to max. 125°C). This can be used, for instance, before an “Aufguss” water splash ceremony to keep the stones better reheated. The module includes a stylish flush-mounting stainless steel push-button with an illuminated ring, a pre-mounted 10 m cable and a small electronic board (RJ12 connector).
products.short_description: The module for EOS Compact, EmoTec, EmoStyle, U-Command and EmoTouch 3 sauna control systems provides commercial sauna operators with a highly practical function.

products.title: SBM-IR Infrared module
products.description: The SBM-IR module allows to control both the sauna and the infrared heating equipment from only one control panel. Universally suitable for all type of IR emitters and foils. Allows 3 operation modes: sauna, infrared, sauna + infrared. 30°-70° with sensor or by intensity through dimming of IR emitters

products.title: SBM-Remote start module
products.description: With this module, you can switch your sauna from a remote location (e.g. hotel reception). products.short_description: With this module, you can switch your sauna from a remote location (e.g. hotel reception).

products.title: Sound module (SBM-S BT ) SBM-S BT sound module with Bluetooth
products.description: The module features an integrated stereo amplifier 2 x 15 W and an integrated MP3 player. Wall-mounting unit. Music files can be retrieved from an SD-card, USB connection or via Bluetooth (only BT version) or an analogue input. A NF 3,5 mm analogue music jack is also available for music streaming. Connection to sauna control unit via sauna bus, own 230 V power supply. Optional USB docking station for mounting in the sauna wall.
products.short_description: The module features an integrated stereo amplifier 2 x 15 W and an integrated MP3 player. Wall-mounting unit.

products.description: Special technical solutions possible upon request, e.g. for use on ships. Robust, durable construction with quality heating elements. Integrated automatic descaling system (cleaning and descaling). Delivery includes a 5 l container with level probe for descaler liquid.
